posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to use Box component code from Vibe documentation.

style.monday.com

Vibe Design System

Vibe design system by monday.com

But this is not working as class names (like Box-stories-module_boxWrapper) used are not present.

Which file do I need to import to do this correctly.
Other components are working fine, like Button, Flex, etc.

Thanks

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Check you are on the latest version of the package

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @YashGarg,

If you check and you have the latest version, please fill this form and our team will take a look into it!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am at the latest version “monday-ui-react-core”: “^2.90.3”.
I have submitted the form.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @YashGarg !

Our team will reply soon!
